title: How to Blow the Shofar: A Technical Guide
title_zh: 如何吹响羊角号(Shofar):技术指南
description: Mouth positioning, breathing technique, the exact sounds (tekiah, shevarim, teruah, tekiah gedolah), and how to practice.
cultural_parallels: Dantian breathing from martial arts and qigong
Daoist concept of returning to the source (返本归真)
historical_period: High Holidays tradition from Temple period (Spring and Autumn Period 春秋时代, ~770-476 BCE) through modern day
author: Torah Light Project
